Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on the legal framework for 'cross-border transactions' and 'international trade,' which are fundamental drivers of economic growth and productive activities (Target 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course provides knowledge of the legal infrastructure needed for enterprises to integrate into global value chains and markets, supporting Target 9.3.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By teaching a standardized legal framework (CISG), the course promotes a rules-based system that can ensure more equal opportunity in global trade (Target 10.3, 10.5).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency is to 'understand and identify... sustainability issues,' which is foundational for adopting sustainable corporate practices in international trade (Target 12.6, 12.8).
